notes: Supplier identifiers are represented as strings to preserve leading zeros.
The source CSV does not contain column headers.
The row order from the source export is preserved as rank.
favorableDeliveryRatePercent is consistent with favorableDeliveryRecordCount divided by evaluatedDeliveryRecordCount where evaluated records exist.
averageDeliveryVarianceDays and secondaryPerformanceRatePercent are provisional labels and should be confirmed against the source SQL.
Maximum overdue age is null for suppliers without overdue schedule lines.
The response contains the complete exported leaderboard in one page; production APIs should apply server-side pagination.
